data.title: Smith & Nephew Discloses Executive Share Vesting and Sales for Tax on 23 March 2026
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Smith & Nephew Snats ( (SNN) ) has provided an announcement.

On 23 March 2026, Smith & Nephew plc reported the vesting of 2023 performance share awards under its Global Share Plans 2020 and 2010, with senior executives including CEO Deepak Nath receiving ordinary shares and selling portions to meet tax obligations. The company also disclosed the vesting of deferred bonus share awards and partial vesting of 2025 restricted share awards under the 2024 Restricted Share Plan, resulting in further share sales for tax, underscoring the continuing use of stock-based remuneration to incentivise management while modestly increasing leadership equity exposure without signaling any change in strategic direction.

These transactions, notified on 24 March 2026 in line with UK Market Abuse Regulation, involve persons discharging managerial responsibilities and are conducted on the London Stock Exchange at a reference price of £11.938637 per share. While primarily administrative in nature, the disclosures provide transparency for investors about insider holdings and reinforce regulatory compliance around executive compensation structures at the FTSE-listed medtech group.

The most recent analyst rating on (SNN) stock is a Buy with a $41.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smith & Nephew Snats stock, see the SNN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SNN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SNN is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by improving financial performance (margin and cash flow rebound) and supportive technicals (price above major moving averages with positive momentum). Valuation is only average at a 22.7 P/E, while the earnings call adds confidence via upbeat 2026 growth/profit guidance but flags meaningful near-term tariff and reimbursement headwinds.

To see Spark’s full report on SNN stock, click here.

More about Smith & Nephew Snats

Smith & Nephew plc is a UK-based medical technology company focused on orthopaedics, sports medicine, and advanced wound management. Listed on the London Stock Exchange, it uses equity-based incentive schemes to align senior leadership and key managers with long-term shareholder value and company performance.

Average Trading Volume: 886,930

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $13.5B

data.title: Canary Gold Flags Promising Paleochannel Gold System at Brazil’s Madeira River Project
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Canary Gold Corp. ( (TSE:BRAZ) ) has provided an announcement.

Canary Gold Corp. reported encouraging early drilling results at its Madeira River Project in Brazil, where shallow holes intersected continuous sand and gravel horizons consistent with a preserved auriferous paleochannel system. Gold was recovered from seven consecutive holes along a 200‑meter drill fence, with two holes returning the highest gold grain counts recorded to date on the property, suggesting lateral continuity across a channel interpreted to exceed 200 meters in width.

The company is ramping up exploration with systematic follow-up drilling, step-out fences, and enhanced sampling and analytical protocols to better define the geometry and controls on gold distribution. Operational capacity is being expanded with additional equipment and the planned mobilization of a combined air-core/reverse circulation rig, which is expected to accelerate drilling and broaden coverage, reinforcing management’s confidence that they are vectoring into a potentially meaningful gold-bearing system.

More about Canary Gold Corp.

Canary Gold Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on gold projects, with its flagship Madeira River Project located in Brazil. Listed on the CSE, OTCQB and Frankfurt exchanges, the company targets paleochannel and fluvial gold systems, using systematic drilling and sampling to delineate potentially economic deposits in underexplored regions.

Average Trading Volume: 119,325

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$10.85M

Learn more about BRAZ stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Platzer AGM Approves Dividend, New Board Mandates and Expanded Capital Flexibility
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Platzer Fastigheter Holding AB ( ($SE:PLAZ.B) ) is now available.

Platzer Fastigheter Holding AB’s 2026 Annual General Meeting approved the 2025 accounts and set a dividend of SEK 2.20 per share, to be paid in two instalments, while granting discharge from liability to the board and CEO. The meeting also confirmed a seven-member board led by re-elected chairman Henrik Forsberg Schoultz, brought in Cecilia Widegren as a new director, set updated board and committee fees, and reappointed PwC with Johan Rippe as auditor in charge.

Shareholders backed the board’s remuneration guidelines and a long-term share incentive plan of up to 165,000 options for senior executives and key staff, strengthening alignment between management and investors. The AGM further authorised the board to repurchase up to 10% of the company’s Class B shares and issue new Class B shares up to 10% of share capital, increasing Platzer’s financial flexibility for property and company acquisitions and supporting its growth strategy in the Gothenburg commercial real estate market.

The most recent analyst rating on ($SE:PLAZ.B) stock is a Hold with a SEK78.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Platzer Fastigheter Holding AB stock, see the SE:PLAZ.B Stock Forecast page.

More about Platzer Fastigheter Holding AB

Platzer Fastigheter Holding AB is a Swedish real estate company that owns and develops commercial properties in Gothenburg, with a portfolio valued at SEK 30 billion. The company is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm’s Mid Cap segment and focuses on office and commercial space in one of Sweden’s key regional growth markets.

Average Trading Volume: 147,874

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: SEK8.08B

Learn more about PLAZ.B stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: EdgeMode Expands Spain Data Center Capacity and Equity
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

EdgeMode ( (EDGM) ) has provided an announcement.

On March 23, 2026, Edgemode, Inc. and its joint venture partners Blackberry, AIF and DC Estate Solutions Cayman Limited amended their existing joint venture to significantly expand the planned capacity of their Spain-based data centers to 4,350 MW. As part of the same addendum, stock options for 400,000,000 shares of Edgemode common stock previously granted to BAIF or its assignees were exchanged for an equal number of fully paid, non-assessable restricted common shares issued in a private, unregistered transaction under securities law exemptions, leaving all other joint venture terms unchanged.

The capacity increase underscores an aggressive scale-up of Edgemode’s European data center ambitions, signaling a substantial boost to its infrastructure footprint and potential computing output. The conversion of options into restricted equity consolidates BAIF’s stake in the company and may align partner incentives more tightly with the long-term performance of the joint venture, while avoiding the immediate dilution dynamics associated with future option exercises.

More about EdgeMode

Edgemode, Inc. operates in the data center and digital infrastructure sector, working through joint ventures to develop and expand large-scale data center capacity. The company collaborates with partners such as Blackberry, AIF and DC Estate Solutions Cayman Limited to build out facilities, including Spain-based data centers aimed at high-capacity computing operations.

Average Trading Volume: 2,882,110

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: $19.49M

data.title: Siav Returns to Profit as Margin Expansion and Reorganization Drive 2025 Turnaround
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Siav S.p.A. ( (IT:SIAV) ) has provided an update.

Siav reported 2025 revenues from sales and services of €35.7 million, up 7% year on year, with value of production rising to €36.4 million and strong growth in outsourcing and services tied partly to public-sector PNRR projects. The company highlighted that, on a like-for-like basis excluding the disposal of subsidiary Mitric, revenue growth would have been around 10%, underscoring a strengthening competitive position and a shift toward higher value-added, recurring solutions.

Profitability improved sharply, with EBITDA up 48% to €9.3 million and the margin expanding to 26%, while EBIT rose to €3.8 million and the group swung from a €1.5 million loss in 2024 to a €1.4 million profit. Management attributed the turnaround to a 2024 reorganization, tighter cost control and a focus on core proprietary platforms, which also contributed to reducing net financial debt to €18.2 million and increasing shareholders’ equity, laying the groundwork for a new growth phase.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:SIAV) stock is a Buy with a EUR5.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Siav S.p.A. stock, see the IT:SIAV Stock Forecast page.

More about Siav S.p.A.

Siav S.p.A. is an Italian content management company listed on Euronext Growth Milan, specializing in proprietary software platforms such as Archiflow, Catflow, Silloge and the new Connect solution. It operates across software licensing, outsourcing services like electronic invoicing and digital preservation, and application development, serving both public sector projects and private clients in a still fragmented market.

Average Trading Volume: 27,677

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: €16.22M

Learn more about SIAV stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Schroder UK Mid Cap Fund PLC GBP ( (GB:SCP) ) has issued an announcement.

Schroder UK Mid Cap Fund PLC has repurchased 10,000 of its ordinary shares at 681.7 pence per share, with the shares to be held in treasury. This move adjusts the company’s capital structure, leaving 36,143,690 ordinary shares in issue, of which 2,368,000 are held in treasury and 33,775,690 carry voting rights.

The updated number of voting rights provides a new reference point for shareholders assessing whether they must disclose holdings under Financial Conduct Authority transparency rules. The buyback may signal capital management discipline and potentially enhance net asset value per share, with implications for existing investors and the fund’s market positioning.

The financial performance shows promise with revenue growth, but volatility in EBIT and lack of cash flow data are concerns. data.title: IAG Finalises €11.6 Million Share Capital Reduction After Buy-Back
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

International Consolidated Airlines ( (GB:IAG) ) has shared an announcement.

International Consolidated Airlines Group has executed a share capital reduction following completion of the second €500 million tranche of its €1 billion share buy-back programme approved at the June 2025 shareholders’ meeting. The company has cancelled 115,531,620 treasury shares, cutting share capital by €11,553,162 and amending its by-laws to reflect a new share capital of €461,166,952.70 divided into 4,611,669,527 ordinary shares.

Following the cancellation, IAG’s outstanding share capital now consists of 4,522,139,744 shares after excluding 89,529,783 remaining treasury shares, with the company set to request formal exclusion of the cancelled shares from trading. The move tightens the share base and finalises this phase of the buy-back, signalling an emphasis on capital returns and potentially enhancing earnings per share and capital structure efficiency for existing investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:IAG) stock is a Buy with a £382.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on International Consolidated Airlines stock, see the GB:IAG Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on IAG Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, IAG is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid operating profitability and cash generation, tempered by a still-leveraged balance sheet and some 2025 slowing (revenue decline and weaker free-cash-flow conversion). Valuation is a clear positive with a low P/E and a moderate dividend yield, while technical indicators are mixed and the latest earnings-call commentary was broadly constructive but noted some segment-level demand and profit pressure.

To see Spark’s full report on IAG stock, click here.

More about International Consolidated Airlines

International Consolidated Airlines Group, S.A. is a major listed airline holding company operating in the commercial aviation sector, with its share capital divided into ordinary shares fully subscribed and paid. The group’s structure and treasury share management reflect its focus on active capital markets participation and shareholder-oriented financial policies.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £16.39B

TietoEVRY, operating under the Tieto brand, is a major Nordic-based software and digital engineering provider delivering mission-critical solutions via its Caretech, Banktech, Indtech and Tech Consulting units. With about 14,000 specialists in vertical software, design, cloud and AI, it posts some EUR 2 billion in annual revenue and is listed on the NASDAQ exchanges in Helsinki and Stockholm as well as on Oslo Børs.

The company has repurchased 90,000 of its own shares on the Helsinki Stock Exchange at an average price of EUR 17.72 per share, for a total consideration of about EUR 1.6 million. Following this transaction, Tieto holds 1,786,693 shares, and the buyback, executed under EU market abuse and buyback regulations, underscores ongoing capital management efforts that can support shareholder value and signal confidence in the firm’s long-term prospects.

Through its specialized businesses Tieto Caretech, Tieto Banktech, Tieto Indtech and Tieto Tech Consulting, the company employs around 14,000 experts and generates roughly EUR 2 billion in annual revenue, with shares listed in Helsinki, Stockholm and Oslo.

The group’s vertical software, design, cloud and AI capabilities are aimed at helping customers innovate with the latest technology and strengthen their competitiveness. The latest update is out from OSB Group PLC ( (GB:OSB) ).

OSB Group PLC has disclosed a share transaction by its chief executive officer, Andy Golding, involving the vesting and subsequent sale of ordinary shares granted under the company’s 2020 Performance Share Plan. Golding saw 115,860 shares vest at no cost and then sold the same number of shares on 20 March 2026 on the London Stock Exchange’s Main Market for total proceeds of about £631,000.

The transaction reflects routine executive remuneration arrangements rather than a change in the company’s strategic direction or capital structure. However, such dealings are closely monitored under UK Market Abuse Regulation to ensure transparency for investors, and the disclosure provides stakeholders with visibility into senior management’s equity-based compensation realisations.

OSB Group PLC is a UK-based specialist lender and retail savings bank that began operating in 2011 and listed on the London Stock Exchange’s main market in 2014. data.title: Optima Health clears Irish FDI hurdle for £100m PAM acquisition
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Optima Health PLC ( (GB:OPT) ) has shared an update.

Optima Health has secured Irish foreign direct investment clearance for its approximately £100 million cash acquisition of PAM Healthcare Limited, a major occupational health and wellness provider in the UK and Ireland, making the deal unconditional and expected to complete around 26 March 2026. The transaction, funded through £70 million of new secured debt with HSBC and Barclays and a £30 million related-party bridge facility to be refinanced via a £35 million underwritten open offer, is described by management as a transformational, strategically complementary deal that should materially advance Optima’s revenue and earnings ambitions while expanding its client base and service capabilities.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:OPT) stock is a Hold with a £183.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Optima Health PLC stock, see the GB:OPT Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on OPT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, OPT is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weakened cash generation (negative free cash flow in 2025) and a high valuation (P/E ~50) despite only thin margins. Financial performance shows improvement with a return to profitability and modest leverage, but volatility reduces confidence. Technical signals are mixed with neutral momentum and the price below longer-term averages.

To see Spark’s full report on OPT stock, click here.

More about Optima Health PLC

Optima Health PLC is the UK’s leading provider of clinically led, technology-enabled occupational health and wellbeing services for public and private sector organisations. The group employs over 1,600 staff, including 800 clinicians, operates more than 50 clinics nationwide, and also serves the Irish market through Optima Health Ireland.
